interactions.summary: Jiang concludes that Harvard asks applicants to perform impossible contradictions: die for passion, die to become a billionaire, and die loyal to Harvard. He says this selects actor-like, dissociated people who can pretend they are not utilitarian, then uses Obama as the model of a soulless actor who sells hope and change without standing for it.

claims.claim: Harvard wants applicants to perform mutually incompatible identities: selfless passion, billionaire ambition, and absolute loyalty to Harvard.
Only dissociated, actor-like people can convincingly perform the non-utilitarian passion that Harvard demands from people who are applying for utilitarian reasons.
Obama is Jiang’s closing example of the elite actor: promising hope and change, then dropping the promise once in power and returning to it only when electorally useful.

signature_moments.moment: Harvard asks the applicant to die three times: for passion, for billionaire success, and for Harvard itself.
signature_moments.source_phrase: I will die for my passion
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It makes the admissions essay into a test of impossible self-division.

signature_moments.moment: The successful applicant is basically an actor.
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It is the closing definition of elite meritocratic personality.

signature_moments.moment: Obama’s hope-and-change persona becomes the example of a soulless elite performance.
signature_moments.source_phrase: sorry, man, I was just joking
signature_moments.why_it_matters: It ties the psychological model back to national politics.

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: Jiang’s final label for the elite applicant or politician who performs incompatible identities for institutional reward.
ASR likely renders Jiang’s recurring “dissociative personality disorder”; here it describes people able to split roles and perform contradictory motives.

chronology_notes.note: The final Obama example returns to 2008, 2012, and 2016 as stages in a single 2025 diagnosis of elite political performance.

uncertainty_notes.note: Transcript phrase “soul-stiff personality disorder” appears to be ASR damage for Jiang’s recurring dissociative personality disorder frame.
